reason: Agent successfully received and responded to mathematical question with correct answer
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home with sidebar containing two agents
Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260602-194537-xlb4" agent in the sidebar - Agent page loaded and agent selected in sidebar
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" (visible in top right status indicator)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message entered in input field and sent via send button; message visible in chat with user bubble showing "Hello! What is 2+2?"
Step 5: Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received in 2 seconds as confirmed by "Worked for 2s" indicator; agent status changed from "working" back to "idle"

Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent's response clearly shows "4" in large text in the center of the chat area; screenshot captured showing full conversation including user question and agent response with the number "4"
